languages.text: "Да, дражайший коллега, ты, безусловно, прав в утверждении, что смерть — это естественное и неотвратимое прекращение жизненных процессов". {n}Генетор поджимает губы.{/n} "Но разве не для того Омниссия даровал нам разум и способность постигать сущее, чтобы мы, люди, подчиняли себе естественный ход вещей? Ты воспринимаешь смерть как данность, но я считаю, что подобный фатализм непостижим для служителя Омниссии — разве машины не стремятся к вечности по образу и подобию Его?"

"Yes, dearest colleague, you are certainly correct in asserting that death is the natural and inevitable cessation of life processes." {n}The Genetor presses his lips together.{/n} "But is that not why the Omnissiah granted us the gift of reason and the ability to comprehend existence, so that we humans would submit to the natural way of things? You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"
languages.original_text: "Да, дражайший коллега, ты, безусловно, прав в утверждении, что смерть — это естественное и неотвратимое прекращение жизненных процессов". {n}Генетор поджимает губы.{/n} "Но разве не для того Омниссия даровал нам разум и способность постигать сущее, чтобы мы, люди, подчиняли себе естественный ход вещей? Ты воспринимаешь смерть как данность, но я считаю, что подобный фатализм непостижим для служителя Омниссии — разве машины не стремятся к вечности по образу и подобию Его?"

You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"

You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"

"Yes, dearest colleague, you are certainly correct in asserting that death is the natural and inevitable cessation of life processes." {n}The Genetor presses his lips together.{/n} "But is that not why the Omnissiah granted us the gift of reason and the ability to comprehend existence, so that we humans would submit to the natural way of things? You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"

languages.text: "Ja, geschätzter Kollege, Ihr habt gewiss recht mit der These, dass der Tod das natürliche und unvermeidbare Ende des Lebensprozesses ist." {n}Der Genetor presst seine Lippen aufeinander.{/n} "Aber hat uns der Omnissiah nicht genau deshalb die Gnade des Verstandes und die Fähigkeit, die Existenz zu erfassen, gewährt, damit wir Menschen uns dem natürlichen Lauf der Dinge beugen? Ihr akzeptiert den Tod als Tatsache, aber ich glaube, ein derartiger Fatalismus ist für einen Diener des Omnissiah unverständlich ... streben Maschinen nicht nach Ewigkeit nach Seinem Abbild?"
languages.original_text: "Yes, dearest colleague, you are certainly correct in asserting that death is the natural and inevitable cessation of life processes." {n}The Genetor presses his lips together.{/n} "But is that not why the Omnissiah granted us the gift of reason and the ability to comprehend existence, so that we humans would submit to the natural way of things? You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"

traits.locale_text: "Ja, geschätzter Kollege, Ihr habt gewiss recht mit der These, dass der Tod das natürliche und unvermeidbare Ende des Lebensprozesses ist." {n}Der Genetor presst seine Lippen aufeinander.{/n} "Aber hat uns der Omnissiah nicht genau deshalb die Gnade des Verstandes und die Fähigkeit, die Existenz zu erfassen, gewährt, damit wir Menschen uns dem natürlichen Lauf der Dinge beugen? Ihr akzeptiert den Tod als Tatsache, aber ich glaube, ein derartiger Fatalismus ist für einen Diener des Omnissiah unverständlich ... streben Maschinen nicht nach Ewigkeit nach Seinem Abbild?"

languages.text: « Oui, mon cher collègue, tu as raison de dire que la mort est la fin naturelle et inévitable des processus vitaux. » {n}Le genetor pince les lèvres.{/n} « Mais l'Omnimessie nous aurait-il dotés de raison et de la capacité de comprendre l'existence pour que nous nous soumettions aux lois de nature ? Pour toi, la mort est inévitable, mais je pense qu'un tel fatalisme est incompréhensible pour un serviteur de l'Omnimessie. Les machines ne cherchent-elles pas à devenir éternelles pour mieux lui ressembler ? »
languages.original_text: "Yes, dearest colleague, you are certainly correct in asserting that death is the natural and inevitable cessation of life processes." {n}The Genetor presses his lips together.{/n} "But is that not why the Omnissiah granted us the gift of reason and the ability to comprehend existence, so that we humans would submit to the natural way of things? You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"

traits.locale_text: « Oui, mon cher collègue, tu as raison de dire que la mort est la fin naturelle et inévitable des processus vitaux. » {n}Le genetor pince les lèvres.{/n} « Mais l'Omnimessie nous aurait-il dotés de raison et de la capacité de comprendre l'existence pour que nous nous soumettions aux lois de nature ? Pour toi, la mort est inévitable, mais je pense qu'un tel fatalisme est incompréhensible pour un serviteur de l'Omnimessie. Les machines ne cherchent-elles pas à devenir éternelles pour mieux lui ressembler ? »

languages.text: “不错，我最亲爱的同僚，你断言‘死亡乃生命过程自然且必然的终结’，这无疑是正确的。”{n}基因士抿紧双唇。{/n}“但欧姆尼赛亚赐予我们理性天赋与理解存在的能力，就是为了让我们顺从自然之道吗？你将死亡视为事实，可我认为，对于欧姆尼赛亚之仆而言，这种宿命论实难接受——机械不正是按照祂的形象与意志在追求永恒吗？”
languages.original_text: "Yes, dearest colleague, you are certainly correct in asserting that death is the natural and inevitable cessation of life processes." {n}The Genetor presses his lips together.{/n} "But is that not why the Omnissiah granted us the gift of reason and the ability to comprehend existence, so that we humans would submit to the natural way of things? You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"

traits.locale_text: “不错，我最亲爱的同僚，你断言‘死亡乃生命过程自然且必然的终结’，这无疑是正确的。”{n}基因士抿紧双唇。{/n}“但欧姆尼赛亚赐予我们理性天赋与理解存在的能力，就是为了让我们顺从自然之道吗？你将死亡视为事实，可我认为，对于欧姆尼赛亚之仆而言，这种宿命论实难接受——机械不正是按照祂的形象与意志在追求永恒吗？”

languages.text: «Efectivamente, estimado colega, está en lo cierto al afirmar que la muerte es la cesación natural e inevitable de los procesos vitales». {n}El genetor aprieta los labios.{/n} «Pero ¿no nos dio el Omnissiah el don de la razón y la capacidad de comprender la existencia para que los humanos se sometan al orden natural de las cosas? Usted acepta la muerte como un hecho, pero yo creo que ese fatalismo es incomprensible en un siervo del Omnissiah. ¿Acaso las máquinas no buscan alcanzar la eternidad en su imagen y semejanza?».
languages.original_text: "Yes, dearest colleague, you are certainly correct in asserting that death is the natural and inevitable cessation of life processes." {n}The Genetor presses his lips together.{/n} "But is that not why the Omnissiah granted us the gift of reason and the ability to comprehend existence, so that we humans would submit to the natural way of things? You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"

traits.locale_text: «Efectivamente, estimado colega, está en lo cierto al afirmar que la muerte es la cesación natural e inevitable de los procesos vitales». {n}El genetor aprieta los labios.{/n} «Pero ¿no nos dio el Omnissiah el don de la razón y la capacidad de comprender la existencia para que los humanos se sometan al orden natural de las cosas? Usted acepta la muerte como un hecho, pero yo creo que ese fatalismo es incomprensible en un siervo del Omnissiah. ¿Acaso las máquinas no buscan alcanzar la eternidad en su imagen y semejanza?».

languages.text: 「そうだ、最愛の同僚よ、死が生命活動の自然かつ不可避な停止であるという君の主張は、確かに正しい。」{n}ジェネターは唇を引き結ぶ。{/n}「だが、だからこそオムニサイアは我々に理性と存在を理解する力を授けたのではないか――我々人間が自然の理に従うようにと？君は死を事実として受け入れているが、私はそのような宿命論はオムニサイアのしもべには解しがたいものだと考える――機械は、神の似姿として永遠を希求しはしないか？」
languages.original_text: "Yes, dearest colleague, you are certainly correct in asserting that death is the natural and inevitable cessation of life processes." {n}The Genetor presses his lips together.{/n} "But is that not why the Omnissiah granted us the gift of reason and the ability to comprehend existence, so that we humans would submit to the natural way of things? You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"

traits.locale_text: 「そうだ、最愛の同僚よ、死が生命活動の自然かつ不可避な停止であるという君の主張は、確かに正しい。」{n}ジェネターは唇を引き結ぶ。{/n}「だが、だからこそオムニサイアは我々に理性と存在を理解する力を授けたのではないか――我々人間が自然の理に従うようにと？君は死を事実として受け入れているが、私はそのような宿命論はオムニサイアのしもべには解しがたいものだと考える――機械は、神の似姿として永遠を希求しはしないか？」

languages.text: "Evet pek değerli meslektaşım... Ölümün, yaşam süreçlerinin doğal ve kaçınılmaz bir şekilde sona ermesi olduğunu iddia etmekte kesinlikle haklısın." {n}Genetör, dudaklarını birbirine bastırıyor.{/n} "Ancak Hermesih bize akıl armağanını ve varoluşu kavrama yeteneğini biz insanlar eşyanın doğal işleyişine boyun eğelim diye vermedi mi? Sen ölümü bir gerçek olarak kabul ediyorsun ama ben böylesi bir kaderciliğin Hermesih'in hizmetkârları için anlaşılamaz olduğuna inanıyorum. Makineler, O'nun suretinde ve benzerliğinde sonsuzluk için çabalamaz mı?"
languages.original_text: "Yes, dearest colleague, you are certainly correct in asserting that death is the natural and inevitable cessation of life processes." {n}The Genetor presses his lips together.{/n} "But is that not why the Omnissiah granted us the gift of reason and the ability to comprehend existence, so that we humans would submit to the natural way of things? You accept death as a fact, but I believe such fatalism is incomprehensible to a servant of the Omnissiah — do not machines strive for eternity in His image and likeness?"
